div.h1: LT vs ET: Kernel Notification State Machine

g.text: Re-notify | YES — if buffer still has data
Read strategy | One chunk per event is safe
Busy-loop risk | Possible if ignored for long
Used by | General servers, safe default
Re-notify | NO — only on state transition
Read strategy | MUST drain to EAGAIN always
Missed data | YES if drain loop missing
Used by | NGINX, Node.js libuv, Redis
higher: stale fds in readiness list
4096B sits silent in recv buffer forever
no new transition → no new event
